message:
feat(robot,serve): expose alert Source field in all output paths and upgrade redaction config to reader locks

The AlertInfo struct was silently dropping the Source field from the
underlying alert model when converting to the output representation,
making it impossible for consumers to distinguish where alerts
originated (e.g. which subsystem, plugin, or external integration
raised them).

- Add Source field (string, json:"source,omitempty") to AlertInfo struct
- Populate Source in all 4 AlertInfo construction sites:
  GetSnapshotWithOptions, buildProjectionBackedSnapshot,
  GetAlertsDetailed, GetDashboard, and GetDashboardAlertsSection
- Update golden schema snapshot to include the new "source" property
- Upgrade redactionMiddleware and GetRedactionConfig from exclusive
  Lock/Unlock to RLock/RUnlock since both paths only read s.redactionCfg,
  eliminating unnecessary request serialization under concurrent load

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
